card.B001.name: Wei Armored Soldier
card.B001.flavor: The Wei armored soldiers were selected by strict standards, wearing three layers of armor and wielding twelve-stone crossbows.
card.B002.name: Qin Elite Soldier
card.B002.flavor: Qin's elite soldiers were unmatched under heaven.
card.B003.name: Zhao Border Cavalry
card.B003.flavor: Zhao's border cavalry were renowned across the land.
card.B004.name: Yan Death Warrior
card.B004.description: Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to the enemy hero.
card.B004.flavor: Yan and Zhao bred many passionate and tragic heroes.
card.B005.name: Chu Elite Soldier
card.B005.flavor: Though Chu has but three clans left, it will be Chu that destroys Qin.
card.B006.name: Qi Expert Striker
card.B006.description: Battlecry: Deal 2 damage randomly split among enemies.
card.B006.flavor: Qi's expert strikers were unmatched in all the land.
card.B007.name: Han Halberdier
card.B007.flavor: Han's halberdiers stood firm as a fortress.
card.B008.name: Sun Wu
card.B008.flavor: Sun Tzu said: War is a matter of vital importance to the state — the realm of life and death, the path to survival or ruin.
card.B009.name: Wu Qi
card.B009.flavor: Wu Qi, as a general, shared the same food and clothing as his soldiers and slept without a mat.
card.B010.name: Sun Bin
card.B010.description: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion Taunt and Divine Shield.
card.B010.flavor: Sun Bin besieged Wei to rescue Zhao — the brilliance of strategy lies in the mind.
card.B011.name: Lian Po
card.B011.flavor: Lian Po is old, but can he still eat his fill?
card.B012.name: Li Mu
card.B012.flavor: Li Mu guarded the border against the Xiongnu, and for ten years they dared not invade Zhao.
card.B013.name: Besiege Wei to Rescue Zhao
card.B013.flavor: Strike at the vital point, feint at the east while attacking the west.
card.B014.name: Burn Boats and Break Cauldrons
card.B014.description: Give all friendly minions +2/+2. At the start of your next turn, destroy them.
card.B014.flavor: With boats burned and cauldrons broken, the hundred Qin passes fell to Chu.
card.B015.name: Fight with One's Back to the River
card.B015.flavor: Fight with your back to the river — place yourself in a death ground and survive.
card.B016.name: Advance Secretly by Chencang
card.B016.flavor: Openly repair the plank road, but secretly advance by Chencang.
card.B017.name: Feint to the East
card.B017.description: Make an enemy minion attack the wrong target.
card.B017.flavor: Claim to strike the east, but actually attack the west.
card.B018.name: Ambush on All Sides
card.B018.description: Deal 4 damage to all enemy minions.
card.B018.flavor: Ambushed on ten sides, surrounded by Chu songs on all sides.
card.B019.name: Wait at Ease for the Exhausted
card.B019.description: Give a friendly minion Immune this turn.
card.B019.flavor: To wait at ease for the exhausted is to control the enemy rather than be controlled.
card.B020.name: Capture the Chieftain
card.B020.description: Destroy the enemy minion with the highest Attack.
card.B020.flavor: To capture bandits, first capture their leader.
card.BW001.name: Wu Hook
card.BW001.flavor: The Wu hook and Yue sword were the sharpest under heaven.
card.BW002.name: King of Yue's Sword
card.BW002.description: Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to the enemy hero.
card.BW002.flavor: King Goujian's sword remained rust-free for a thousand years.
card.BW003.name: Eight-Foot Snake Lance
card.BW003.flavor: The eight-foot snake lance, a weapon for conquerors.
card.F001.name: Law Enforcer
card.F001.description: Battlecry: Give an enemy minion -2 Attack.
card.F001.flavor: The law is the common instrument of all under heaven.
card.F002.name: Criminal Servant
card.F002.description: Deathrattle: Deal 1 damage to the enemy hero.
card.F002.flavor: The law does not favor the noble; punishment does not spare high ministers.
card.F003.name: Prison Guard
card.F003.flavor: The prison guard watches over inmates with fairness and impartiality.
card.F004.name: Decree Official
card.F004.flavor: The decree official administers the laws and edicts.
card.F005.name: Minister of Justice
card.F005.description: Battlecry: Destroy a minion with 2 or less Attack.
card.F005.flavor: The minister of justice oversees punishment, punishing evil and promoting good.
card.F006.name: Grand Court
card.F006.description: Battlecry: Give all enemy minions -1 Attack.
card.F006.flavor: The chief of the Grand Court oversees criminal cases.
card.F007.name: Legalist Disciple
card.F007.flavor: Legalist disciples diligently study the laws and decrees.
card.F008.name: Shang Yang
card.F008.description: Battlecry: Reduce the cost of all minions in your hand by 2.
card.F008.flavor: Shang Yang reformed the laws, and Qin prospered through strength.
card.F009.name: Han Fei
card.F009.flavor: Han Feizi, the father of legal and tactical thought.
card.F010.name: Li Kui
card.F010.flavor: Li Kui wrote the Canon of Laws, pioneering the Legalist school.
card.F011.name: Shen Buhai
card.F011.description: Battlecry: Return an enemy minion to your opponent's hand.
card.F011.flavor: Shen Buhai spoke of statecraft and knew how to manage subordinates.
card.F012.name: Wu Qi's Reforms
card.F012.description: Battlecry: Destroy all minions with odd Attack.
card.F012.flavor: Wu Qi reformed Chu, abolishing hereditary privileges.
card.F013.name: The Way of Penalties and Names
card.F013.description: Swap the Attack and Health of an enemy minion.
card.F013.flavor: Penalties, names, and methods — the interplay of yin and yang.
card.F014.name: Harsh Laws and Severe Punishments
card.F014.flavor: Severe laws and harsh punishments strike fear into all directions.
card.F015.name: All Decided by Law
card.F015.description: Silence a minion and make it unable to attack.
card.F015.flavor: All judgments follow the law, with clear rewards and punishments.
card.F016.name: Rule the State by Law
card.F016.flavor: To rule the state by law is the enduring law of the land.
card.F017.name: Collective Punishment
card.F017.description: Destroy a minion. Each adjacent minion takes 2 damage.
card.F017.flavor: With collective punishment, one man's crime brings punishment to his neighbors.
card.F018.name: Reward Farming and Warfare
card.F018.description: Give a friendly minion +2/+1 and draw a card.
card.F018.flavor: Reward farming and warfare to enrich the state and strengthen the army.
card.F019.name: Abolish the Well-Field System
card.F019.description: Destroy all minions with even Cost.
card.F019.flavor: Abolish the well-field system and make land privately owned.
card.F020.name: Standardize Weights and Measures
card.F020.description: Set all minions' Attack and Health to 3.
card.F020.flavor: Standardize weights and measures — same axle width, same script.
card.FW001.name: Legalist Rule Ruler
card.FW001.flavor: The Legalist's punishment ruler, precise in its measurements.
card.FW002.name: Penal Tripod
card.FW002.flavor: Casting penal codes on a tripod — making the law public.
card.R001.name: Confucian Scholar
card.R001.flavor: A Confucian student, holding the Analects, gentle and refined.
card.R002.name: Ritual Official
card.R002.flavor: A ritual official holding a jade scepter, dignified in demeanor.
card.R003.name: Court Musician
card.R003.flavor: A court musician plays the zither, with harmonious melodies.
card.R004.name: Prison Warden
card.R004.description: Battlecry: Make an enemy minion unable to attack.
card.R004.flavor: The prison warden enforces the law with benevolence, reforming prisoners.
card.R005.name: Gentleman
card.R005.flavor: A Confucian gentleman, adorned with jade, of noble virtue.
card.R006.name: Worthy Man
card.R006.flavor: A man of virtue, radiating wisdom and admired by all.
card.R007.name: Master
card.R007.flavor: A Confucian teacher holding a rod, offering earnest instruction.
card.R008.name: Confucius
card.R008.description: Battlecry: Give all friendly minions Divine Shield and Taunt.
card.R008.flavor: Confucius traveled the states with three thousand disciples, radiating benevolence.
card.R009.name: Mencius
card.R009.description: Battlecry: Draw 3 cards. If any are minions, give them +2/+2.
card.R009.flavor: Mencius debated with overwhelming momentum — the people are precious, the ruler light.
card.R010.name: Xunzi
card.R010.description: Battlecry: Give all friendly minions +1 Attack.
card.R010.flavor: Xunzi lectured on human nature being evil, valuing both ritual and law.
card.R011.name: Zilu
card.R011.flavor: Zilu was valiant, wielding a longsword with an upright character.
card.R012.name: Zengzi
card.R012.flavor: Zengzi served his parents with filial devotion, a model of piety.
card.R013.name: Govern with Benevolence
card.R013.description: Restore 6 Health to all friendly characters.
card.R013.flavor: When benevolent governance is implemented, the people live in peace and prosperity.
card.R014.name: Rites and Music Bring Spring
card.R014.flavor: The civilizing influence of rites and music brings harmony and the warmth of spring.
card.R015.name: Enlighten the Masses
card.R015.flavor: Confucian education enlightens the people and spreads civilization.
card.R016.name: Army of Benevolence
card.R016.flavor: A benevolent army does not kill surrendering soldiers and takes nothing from the people.
card.R017.name: Win People by Virtue
card.R017.description: Set an enemy minion's Attack to 1.
card.R017.flavor: Win people over by virtue, and even enemies submit willingly.
card.R018.name: Reflect Thrice Daily
card.R018.description: Draw a card. If it is a minion, give it +1/+1.
card.R019.name: Teach Without Discrimination
card.R019.description: Discover a card from any class.
card.R019.flavor: Education is equal — students from all walks of life study together.
card.R020.name: Restrain Oneself and Restore Rites
card.R020.description: Give a friendly minion Divine Shield and Taunt.
card.R020.flavor: Restrain selfish desires, restore the Zhou rites, and rebuild order.
card.RW001.name: Confucian Jade Scepter
card.RW001.flavor: A ceremonial jade scepter, pointed at the top and square at the bottom, symbolizing power and virtue.
card.RW002.name: Ritual Bell Chime
card.RW002.flavor: A complete set of chime bells, grand ritual instruments with harmonious tones.
card.D001.name: Taoist Apprentice
card.D001.flavor: A young Taoist apprentice, holding a whisk, innocent and carefree.
card.D002.name: Mountain Guardian
card.D002.flavor: A hermit of the mountains, guarding the gate, at one with nature.
card.D003.name: Stargazer
card.D003.flavor: Gazing at the stars for divination, observing celestial patterns at night to foresee the future.
card.D004.name: Talisman Master
card.D004.description: Battlecry: Give an enemy minion -2 Attack.
card.D004.flavor: A Taoist priest painting talismans with cinnabar on yellow paper, runes dancing in the air.
card.D005.name: Perfected Person
card.D005.flavor: An enlightened Taoist immortal, with celestial grace, riding the winds.
card.D006.name: Hermit
card.D006.flavor: A deep-mountain hermit, untouched by worldly affairs, free and at ease.
card.D007.name: Alchemist
card.D007.description: Battlecry: Deal 2 damage randomly split among enemies.
card.D007.flavor: An alchemist tending the roaring furnace, seeking immortality.
card.D008.name: Laozi
card.D008.description: Battlecry: Reduce the cost of all spells in your hand by 3.
card.D008.flavor: Laozi rides a black ox as purple vapor arrives from the east, surrounded by the Dao De Jing.
card.D009.name: Zhuangzi
card.D009.description: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion "Cannot be targeted by spells or Hero Powers."
card.D009.flavor: Zhuangzi dreamed of a butterfly, lost in the realm of forgetting self and world.
card.D010.name: Liezi
card.D010.description: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion Windfury and Divine Shield.
card.D010.flavor: Liezi rides the wind, traveling freely with elegance.
card.D011.name: Guan Yinzi
card.D011.flavor: Guan Yinzi guarded the pass, passing down the Taoist tradition.
card.D012.name: Wenzi
card.D012.flavor: Wenzi authored texts, carrying forward Taoist thought.
card.D013.name: The Dao Follows Nature
card.D013.description: Give a friendly minion +2/+2 and Taunt.
card.D013.flavor: The Tao follows nature — all things in harmony, thriving with vitality.
card.D014.name: Govern by Non-Action
card.D014.description: Minions cannot attack for one turn.
card.D014.flavor: Rule by non-intervention — the government does not interfere, and the people govern themselves.
card.D015.name: Supreme Goodness Is Like Water
card.D015.description: Restore 8 Health to a friendly character.
card.D015.flavor: Supreme goodness is like water — water benefits all things without contention.
card.D016.name: Emptiness and Stillness
card.D016.flavor: In emptiness and stillness, the mind is calm and external disturbances fade.
card.D017.name: On the Equality of Things
card.D017.description: Set all minions' Attack and Health to 4.
card.D017.flavor: All things are one — differences vanish into a realm of equality.
card.D018.name: Carefree Wandering
card.D018.description: Give a friendly minion Charge, Windfury, and Divine Shield.
card.D018.flavor: Carefree wandering — soaring freely, unrestrained and boundless.
card.D019.name: The Essence of Nurturing Life
card.D019.flavor: The way of nurturing life — prolonging years, with abundant vitality.
card.D020.name: Cook Ding Carves the Ox
card.D020.description: Destroy a minion with 3 or less Attack.
card.D020.flavor: Cook Ding carves the ox with effortless skill and masterful precision.
card.DW001.name: Taoist Whisk
card.DW001.description: Battlecry: Give an enemy minion -2 Attack.
card.DW001.flavor: The Taoist whisk sweeps away troubles, pure and non-active.
card.DW002.name: Tai Chi Sword
card.DW002.flavor: A sword with the Tai Chi pattern — yin and yang balanced, softness overcoming hardness.
card.M001.name: Crossbow Turret
card.M001.flavor: A Mohist crossbowman wielding a repeating crossbow, a precise mechanical marvel.
card.M002.name: Mechanical Beast
card.M002.flavor: A wooden mechanical beast with spinning gears, moving with agility.
card.M003.name: Mohist Disciple
card.M003.flavor: A Mohist apprentice holding tools, diligently studying and crafting.
card.M004.name: Fortress Crossbowman
card.M004.flavor: A wall-mounted crossbowman operating a massive siege crossbow, a formidable defensive weapon.
card.M005.name: Siege Engineer
card.M005.flavor: Engineers building fortifications, fully equipped with tools.
card.M006.name: Siege Giant
card.M006.flavor: A giant siege engine, built like a catapult.
card.M007.name: Master Artificer
card.M007.flavor: A Mohist master craftsman, inventor and creator, radiating wisdom.
card.M008.name: Mozi
card.M008.flavor: Mozi opposes aggression, holding a compass and square, radiating universal love.
card.M009.name: Gongshu Ban
card.M009.flavor: Gongshu Ban (Lu Ban), the master carpenter and inventor of tools.
card.M010.name: Qin Huali
card.M010.description: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion Divine Shield.
card.M010.flavor: Mozi's chief disciple and a defense specialist.
card.M011.name: Tian Jiu
card.M011.flavor: A Mohist debater with rigorous logic, skilled in argumentation.
card.M012.name: Fu Tun
card.M012.description: Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to a random enemy minion.
card.M012.flavor: The Mohist leader, strict in enforcing laws, placing righteousness above family.
card.M013.name: Universal Love and Condemn Aggression
card.M013.description: Minions cannot attack for one turn.
card.M013.flavor: Universal love and non-aggression — the ideal of peace, halting war.
card.M014.name: Mohist Defense
card.M014.flavor: The Mohist defense is as solid as a fortress, impenetrable to enemies.
card.M015.name: Art of Machinery
card.M015.flavor: The art of machinery displayed — intricate mechanisms running automatically.
card.M016.name: Arrow Deflection Technique
card.M016.description: Give a friendly character Immune for one turn.
card.M016.flavor: The art of deflecting arrows — clever shields that bounce projectiles away.
card.M017.name: Frugality and Simple Burials
card.M017.flavor: The principle of thrift, opposing extravagance and lavish burials.
card.M018.name: Revere the Worthy and Unify Standards
card.M018.flavor: Honoring the capable, unifying thought, and working as a team.
card.M019.name: Heaven's Will and Ghostly Judgment
card.M019.flavor: Faith in Heaven's will and the supervision of spirits — righteous punishment.
card.M020.name: Against Music and Against Fate
card.M020.flavor: Opposing extravagant music and rejecting fatalistic determinism.
card.MW001.name: Mohist Repeating Crossbow
card.MW001.flavor: A repeating mechanical crossbow, precise and fast-firing.
card.MW002.name: Lu Ban's Ruler
card.MW002.flavor: Lu Ban's ruler, a measuring tool for innovation and invention.
card.Y001.name: Shaman Priest
card.Y001.flavor: A sacrificial shaman holding a bone flute, conducting mysterious rituals.
card.Y002.name: Diviner
card.Y002.flavor: A diviner scorching tortoise shells and reading the cracks.
card.Y003.name: Five Elements Disciple
card.Y003.description: Deathrattle: Deal 1 damage to a random enemy.
card.Y003.flavor: An apprentice of the Five Elements, holding elemental banners and studying divination.
card.Y004.name: High Priest
card.Y004.description: Battlecry: Give an enemy minion -2 Attack.
card.Y004.flavor: A high priest presiding over sacrifices, communicating with heaven and earth.
card.Y005.name: Astrologer
card.Y005.description: Battlecry: Draw a card. If it is a spell, reduce its cost by 2.
card.Y005.flavor: An astrologer mapping the stars, divining fortune and misfortune.
card.Y006.name: Feng Shui Master
card.Y006.flavor: A Feng Shui master using a compass to orient and harmonize energy.
card.Y007.name: Occult Practitioner
card.Y007.description: Battlecry: Cast a random Five Elements spell.
card.Y007.flavor: An occult practitioner seeking immortality through alchemy, mysterious and unfathomable.
card.Y008.name: Zou Yan
card.Y008.description: Battlecry: Cast random Five Elements effects on all enemies.
card.Y008.flavor: Zou Yan discoursed on the heavens — the Five Elements in mutual generation, a cosmic theory.
card.Y009.name: Gan De
card.Y009.flavor: Astronomer Gan De, charting the stars and observing celestial phenomena.
card.Y010.name: Shi Shen
card.Y010.description: Battlecry: Give all friendly minions +1 Spell Damage.
card.Y010.flavor: Astronomer Shi Shen, equally renowned alongside Gan De.
card.Y011.name: Nan Gong
card.Y011.flavor: Yin-Yang master Nan Gong prophesied: 'Though Chu has but three clans, it will be Chu that destroys Qin.'
card.Y012.name: An Qi Sheng
card.Y012.flavor: The immortal An Qi Sheng, ageless and surrounded by celestial energy.
card.Y013.name: Five Elements in Mutual Generation
card.Y013.description: Give a friendly minion +2/+2 and draw a card.
card.Y013.flavor: The Five Elements generate each other: Wood generates Fire, Fire generates Earth, Earth generates Metal, Metal generates Water, Water generates Wood.
card.Y014.name: Harmony of Yin and Yang
card.Y014.description: Restore 4 Health to all friendly characters and deal 4 damage to all enemies.
card.Y014.flavor: Balance of yin and yang — the Tai Chi symbol rotates in harmonious unity.
card.Y015.name: Celestial Anomaly
card.Y015.description: Cast 3 random different Five Elements spells.
card.Y015.flavor: Unusual celestial phenomena — solar and lunar eclipses, comets, meteor showers.
card.Y016.name: Divine by Stars
card.Y016.flavor: Divining by the stars to predict the future and guide decisions.
card.Y017.name: Great Nine Provinces Theory
card.Y017.flavor: The Great Nine Provinces theory — world geography and the distribution of civilizations.
card.Y018.name: Cycle of Five Virtues
card.Y018.description: Give a friendly minion +4/+4 and an enemy minion -4/-4.
card.Y018.flavor: The cycle of the Five Virtues — dynastic succession and the transfer of Heaven's mandate.
card.Y019.name: Calamity and Warning
card.Y019.description: Deal 3 damage to a minion. If it dies, draw a card.
card.Y019.flavor: Calamities as warnings — Heaven's omens urging the ruler to self-reflect.
card.Y020.name: Auspicious Omens
card.Y020.description: Give a friendly minion +1/+1 and draw a card.
card.Y020.flavor: Auspicious signs — the arrival of the phoenix and the appearance of the qilin.
card.YW001.name: Yin-Yang Five Elements Staff
card.YW001.description: Battlecry: Cast a random Five Elements spell.
card.YW001.flavor: A staff of the Five Elements, surrounded by Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water.
card.YW002.name: Astrolabe
card.YW002.flavor: A precision astrolabe for celestial positioning and predicting astronomical phenomena.
card.Z001.name: Debater
card.Z001.flavor: A Diplomatic debater, eloquent and persuasive.
card.Z002.name: Lobbyist
card.Z002.flavor: Lobbyists travel far and wide to dismantle enemy alliances.
card.Z003.name: Assassin
card.Z003.flavor: A single strike from an assassin — a deadly threat.
card.Z004.name: Envoy
card.Z004.description: Battlecry: Draw a card. If it is a spell, repeat this effect.
card.Z004.flavor: Envoys travel back and forth, delivering messages.
card.Z005.name: Strategist
card.Z005.description: Battlecry: Discover a card both players have.
card.Z005.flavor: A strategist with many schemes, anticipating the enemy's moves.
card.Z006.name: Diplomat
card.Z006.flavor: Diplomats mediate conflicts and maintain peace.
card.Z007.name: Policy Advisor
card.Z007.description: Deathrattle: Deal 1 damage to all enemy minions.
card.Z007.flavor: A policy advisor offers strategies that decide victory from a thousand miles away.
card.Z008.name: Su Qin
card.Z008.flavor: Su Qin forged the Vertical Alliance, becoming chancellor of six states.
card.Z009.name: Zhang Yi
card.Z009.flavor: Zhang Yi promoted the Horizontal Alliance, dismantling the Vertical Alliance.
card.Z010.name: Fan Ju
card.Z010.description: Battlecry: Return an enemy minion to the hand.
card.Z010.flavor: Fan Ju advocated befriending distant states while attacking nearby ones, maneuvering with skill.
card.Z011.name: Lin Xiangru
card.Z011.description: Divine Shield. Battlecry: Draw a card.
card.Z011.flavor: Lin Xiangru returned the jade intact to Zhao — a blend of wisdom and courage.
card.Z012.name: Master Guigu
card.Z012.flavor: Master Guigu, the founder of the Diplomat School, with disciples spread across the land.
card.Z013.name: Horizontal Alliance
card.Z013.description: Draw a card. Gain 1 Mana Crystal.
card.Z013.flavor: The art of the Horizontal Alliance — use strength to strike the weak.
card.Z014.name: Vertical Alliance
card.Z014.flavor: The strategy of the Vertical Alliance — use unity to overcome the strong.
card.Z015.name: Befriend Far, Attack Near
card.Z015.flavor: Befriend distant states while attacking those nearby, defeating enemies one by one.
card.Z016.name: Maneuvering and Uniting
card.Z016.description: Discover a card and add a copy of it to your hand.
card.Z016.flavor: Maneuvering and uniting — the world is a chessboard.
card.Z017.name: Return the Jade Intact to Zhao
card.Z017.flavor: Lin Xiangru returned the jade intact to Zhao — wisdom and courage combined.
card.Z018.name: Sow Discord
card.Z018.description: Make an enemy minion attack its ally.
card.Z018.flavor: Sowing discord to set the enemy camp against itself.
card.Z019.name: Empty Fort Strategy
card.Z019.description: Give your hero Immune for one turn.
card.Z019.flavor: The Empty Fort strategy — a bluff to deceive the enemy.
card.Z020.name: Lure the Tiger from the Mountain
card.Z020.description: Return an enemy minion to the hand.
card.Z020.flavor: Lure the tiger from the mountain — a strategy of enticement.
card.ZW001.name: Diplomat's Dagger
card.ZW001.flavor: An assassin's dagger, easy to conceal, deadly at close range.
card.ZW002.name: Scroll of Alliance and Strategy
card.ZW002.flavor: A diplomatic document outlining the strategies of vertical and horizontal alliances.
card.N001.name: Militia
card.N001.flavor: Militiamen from various states, called to arms in wartime.
card.N002.name: Scout
card.N002.flavor: Scouts blaze the trail — information comes first.
card.N003.name: Wanderer
card.N003.flavor: Wandering the world, finding home everywhere.
card.N004.name: Guard
card.N004.flavor: The guard protects his lord with unwavering loyalty.
card.N005.name: Swordsman
card.N005.flavor: A roving swordsman, quick to repay kindness and enmity.
card.N006.name: Advisor
card.N006.flavor: A wise advisor, orchestrating strategies from within the tent.
card.N007.name: Herbalist
card.N007.flavor: The herbalist concocts medicine, curing the sick and saving lives.
card.N008.name: Armored Soldier
card.N008.flavor: A heavily armored soldier, an iron wall.
card.N009.name: Archer
card.N009.flavor: A long-range archer, hitting a willow leaf from a hundred paces.
card.N010.name: Cavalry
card.N011.name: Mystic
card.N011.flavor: A mystic casting spells, mysterious and unfathomable.
card.N012.name: Physician
card.N012.flavor: The physician heals the sick, bringing life back with a miraculous touch.
card.N013.name: General
card.N013.flavor: A general commanding thousands of troops.
card.N014.name: Colonel
card.N014.flavor: A colonel drilling troops with strict discipline.
card.N015.name: Warrior
card.N015.flavor: The warrior spirit — facing death as if returning home.
card.N016.name: Assassin

card.N017.name: Commandant
card.N017.flavor: A commandant responsible for defending his territory.
card.N018.name: Fierce General
card.N018.flavor: A fierce general like a tiger, unmatched against ten thousand foes.
card.N019.name: Chief Strategist
card.N019.flavor: The chief strategist plans victory from a thousand miles away.
card.N020.name: Mammoth
card.N020.flavor: A war elephant charging forward, an unstoppable force.
card.N021.name: Grand General
card.N021.flavor: The grand general's prestige commands respect across the land.
card.N022.name: Brave Warrior
card.N022.flavor: An unparalleled warrior, strong enough to match ten thousand.
card.N023.name: Grandmaster
card.N023.flavor: A grandmaster of martial arts, leader of the chivalrous world.
card.N024.name: Supreme General
card.N024.flavor: The supreme general, highest among officials, commanding the three armies.
card.N025.name: War God
card.N025.flavor: The War God Xingtian, valiant and invincible.
card.N026.name: Overlord
card.N026.description: Taunt. Battlecry: Give all enemy minions -2/-2.
card.N026.flavor: With the strength to lift mountains, his spirit overshadowed the world.
card.N027.name: Heavenly Emperor
card.N027.description: Battlecry: Destroy all enemy minions with less than 5 Attack.
card.N027.flavor: Mandate of Heaven — the countenance of a true king.
card.N028.name: Divine Dragon
card.N028.description: Taunt. Battlecry: Restore 10 Health to all friendly characters.
card.N028.flavor: The dragon soars across the four seas, bringing peace to the world.
card.N029.name: Deploy Troops and Command Generals
card.N029.flavor: Deploying troops and commanding generals — skilled orchestration.
card.N030.name: Surrounded by Chu Songs
card.N030.description: Deal 1 damage to all enemy minions.
card.N030.flavor: Surrounded by Chu songs on all sides — the enemy army trapped.
card.N031.name: Know Yourself and Your Enemy
card.N031.flavor: Know yourself and know your enemy, and you will never be defeated.
card.N032.name: Fortify the Walls and Clear the Fields
card.N032.flavor: Fortify the walls and clear the fields — the enemy finds nothing.
card.N033.name: Defeat the Many with the Few
card.N033.flavor: Troops are valued for quality, not quantity.
card.N034.name: Surprise Attack
card.N034.description: Deal 3 damage to the enemy hero.
card.N034.flavor: A successful surprise attack throws the enemy into chaos.
card.N035.name: Reinforcements
card.N035.flavor: Reinforcements arrive in an endless stream.
card.N036.name: Decisive Match
card.N036.flavor: The moment of decisive battle — a fight to the finish.
card.N037.name: Sweep Through Thousands
card.N037.description: Deal 5 damage to all enemy minions.
card.N037.flavor: Sweeping through thousands of troops like rolling up a mat.
card.N038.name: Turn the Tables
card.N038.flavor: Turn the tables — offense and defense shift positions.
card.NW001.name: Bronze Sword
card.NW001.flavor: A standard bronze sword with decorative patterns on the blade.
card.NW002.name: Halberd
card.NW002.flavor: A halberd in hand, sweeping through thousands of troops.
card.NW003.name: King of Qin's Sword
card.NW003.flavor: The sword of Qin Shi Huang, who unified the six states.
hero.H_B001.name: Sun Bin
hero.H_B001.flavor: Besiege Wei to rescue Zhao — a classic strategic example.
hero.H_B002.name: Wu Qi
hero.H_B002.flavor: Reward farming and warfare to enrich the state and strengthen the army.
hero.H_B003.name: Lian Po
hero.H_B003.flavor: Carrying thorns to offer an apology — the reconciliation of the general and the minister.
hero.H_F001.name: Shang Yang
hero.H_F001.powerDescription: Reduce the cost of the highest-Cost minion in your hand by 2.
hero.H_F001.flavor: Shang Yang reformed the laws, and Qin prospered through strength.
hero.H_F002.name: Han Fei
hero.H_F002.flavor: The three arts of Legalism: Authority, Statecraft, and Law.
hero.H_F003.name: Shen Buhai
hero.H_F003.powerDescription: Return an enemy minion to the hand.
hero.H_F003.flavor: Shen Buhai spoke of statecraft and knew how to manage subordinates.
hero.H_R001.name: Confucius
hero.H_R001.flavor: Confucius traveled the states with three thousand disciples.
hero.H_R002.name: Mencius
hero.H_R002.flavor: The people are most precious, the state is next, and the ruler is the least.
hero.H_R003.name: Xunzi
hero.H_R003.flavor: Xunzi exalted rites, valuing both ritual and law equally.
hero.H_D001.name: Laozi
hero.H_D001.flavor: The Tao that can be told is not the eternal Tao.
hero.H_D002.name: Zhuangzi
hero.H_D002.flavor: Carefree wandering — forgetting both self and the world.
hero.H_D003.name: Liezi
hero.H_D003.flavor: Liezi rides the wind, traveling with the breeze.
hero.H_M001.name: Mozi
hero.H_M001.flavor: Mozi's universal love — condemning aggression to end war.
hero.H_M002.name: Gongshu Ban
hero.H_M002.flavor: Gongshu Ban (Lu Ban), the master carpenter.
hero.H_M003.name: Qin Huali
hero.H_M003.flavor: The defense specialist of the Mohist school — Qin Huali.
hero.H_Y001.name: Zou Yan
hero.H_Y001.powerDescription: Deal 3 damage randomly split among enemies.
hero.H_Y001.flavor: Zou Yan discoursed on the heavens — the Five Elements in mutual generation.
hero.H_Y002.name: Gan De
hero.H_Y002.flavor: Astronomer Gan De, charting the stars.
hero.H_Y003.name: Shi Shen
hero.H_Y003.powerDescription: Draw a card. If it is a spell, add a copy to your hand.
hero.H_Y003.flavor: Shi Shen's astronomy, equally renowned alongside Gan De.
hero.H_Z001.name: Su Qin
hero.H_Z001.flavor: Su Qin forged the Vertical Alliance, becoming chancellor of six states.
hero.H_Z002.name: Zhang Yi
hero.H_Z002.flavor: Zhang Yi promoted the Horizontal Alliance, dismantling the Vertical Alliance.
hero.H_Z003.name: Master Guigu
hero.H_Z003.flavor: Master Guigu, the founder of the Diplomat School.
chapter.chapter_1.name: Warring States Rising
chapter.chapter_1.description: Begin from the Spring and Autumn period, the road to unifying all under heaven.
chapter.chapter_2.name: Hundred Schools of Thought
chapter.chapter_2.description: A hundred schools contend — the clash of ideas.
chapter.chapter_3.name: Unification Under Heaven
chapter.chapter_3.description: The final battle to unite all under heaven.
mission.1-1.name: First Steps
mission.1-1.description: Follow Sun Bin to learn basic tactics.
mission.1-2.name: Besiege Wei to Rescue Zhao
mission.1-2.description: Face Pang Juan's siege and respond with flexibility.
mission.1-3.name: Shang Yang's Reforms
mission.1-3.description: Face the reformed army of Qin.
mission.1-4.name: Jixia Academy
mission.1-5.name: Vertical and Horizontal Alliances
mission.1-5.description: Defeat the Six States Chancellor Su Qin.
mission.1-6.name: An Old Horse Knows the Way
mission.1-6.description: Follow Laozi to comprehend the Tao of nature.
mission.1-7.name: Army of Benevolence
mission.1-7.description: Face Mencius on the path of benevolence and righteousness.
mission.1-8.name: Fortress Defense
mission.1-8.description: Break through the Mohist fortress defenses.
mission.1-9.name: Five Thunder Heart
mission.1-9.description: Face the Five Elements spells of the Yin-Yang school.
mission.1-10.name: Sun Bin vs. Pang Juan
mission.1-10.description: Sun Bin sets a trap by reducing campfires — do not underestimate the enemy.
mission.2-1.name: Laozi on the Tao
mission.2-1.description: Discuss the Tao with Laozi and comprehend the way of non-action.
mission.2-2.name: Three Arts of Legalism
mission.2-2.description: Face Han Fei's doctrine of authority, statecraft, and law.
mission.2-3.name: Mohist Non-Aggression
mission.2-3.description: Forcibly breach the Mohist mechanical fortress.
mission.2-4.name: Hundred Schools Contend
mission.2-5.name: Cook Ding Carves the Ox
mission.2-6.name: Yin-Yang and Five Elements
mission.2-6.description: Counter Zou Yan's Five Elements formation.
mission.2-7.name: Law Shows No Mercy
mission.2-7.description: Face Shang Yang's harsh laws and severe punishments.
mission.2-8.name: Maneuvering and Uniting
mission.2-8.description: Counter Zhang Yi's Horizontal Alliance tactics.
mission.2-9.name: Universal Love and Condemn Aggression
mission.2-10.name: Heaven's Will and Ghostly Judgment
mission.2-10.description: Defeat the Yin-Yang grandmaster Zou Yan.
mission.3-1.name: Battle of Changping
mission.3-1.description: Face the veteran general Lian Po's stubborn defense.
mission.3-2.name: Jing Ke Assassinates the Qin King
mission.3-2.description: Face the greatest assassin under heaven.
mission.3-3.name: Wang Jian Conquers Chu
mission.3-3.description: Outwit Zhao's famed general Li Mu.
mission.3-4.name: Han Fei Enters Qin
mission.3-5.name: All Schools Converge
mission.3-5.description: Master Guigu gathers the wisdom of all schools.
mission.3-6.name: Burn Books and Bury Scholars
mission.3-6.description: Face Li Kui's preference for law over Confucianism.
mission.3-7.name: Zhang Yi's Horizontal Alliance
mission.3-7.description: Counter Zhang Yi's Horizontal Alliance schemes.
mission.3-8.name: Strike North Against the Xiongnu
mission.3-8.description: Emulate Li Mu in striking the Xiongnu in the north.
mission.3-9.name: The First Emperor's Unification
mission.3-9.description: Face Qin Shi Huang's million-strong army.
mission.3-final.name: Ultimate Battle
mission.3-final.description: Defeat Qin Shi Huang at his peak strength.

roguelite.confirm_end_desc: Are you sure? Progress will be lost.
roguelite.shop_hint: Spend 10 gold to buy a card
tutorial.welcome_desc: A CCG set in the Warring States period. Tap to begin your journey.
tutorial.battle_desc: Tap the Adventure button to enter story mode and challenge the lords.
tutorial.hand_desc: Each turn you draw cards. Spend mana crystals (green number) to play them.
tutorial.attack_desc: Tap your minion, then tap the enemy hero to attack. Defeat all opponents!
tutorial.done_desc: You know the basics. Go ahead and conquer the Warring States!
quest.title: title
achievement.title: title
